title: Government response to the Select Committee report on the British film industry session 2002 to 2003
body: "This document contains the following information: British film industry: Government response to the Select Committee report on the British film industry session 2002 to 2003.  This Command Paper was laid before Parliament by a Government Minister by Command of Her Majesty. Command Papers are considered by the Government to be of interest to Parliament but are not required to be presented by legislation. "
